sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The player moved right twice and is now at the right end of the blue bar. Let me check if the bar is fully consumed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Player: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 12:
        print(f"Frame: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] in ('b', 'g') and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"Bar: color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! The bar didn't disappear - it seems to have reformed or shifted. The blue bar is now at (28,28)-(31,35) and the gray interior at (29,29)-(30,35). The player is at (28,36)-(31,38), to the right of the bar. The white trail is at (28,39)-(31,39).
So the bar didn't get fully consumed - it seems to have a fixed size and the player just moved through it. Let me reconsider.
Wait, looking at the boundary more carefully:
- Blue bar: [[28, 28], [28, 35], [28, 29], [29, 28], [30, 28], [31, 29], [31, 35], [31, 28]] - this is a weird shape, not a simple rectangle
- Gray interior: [[29, 29], [29, 35], [30, 35], [30, 29]] - this is a 2x7 rectangle
The blue bar boundary is strange - it seems like the bar got partially eaten. Let me look at the ascii to understand better.
Actually, I think the bar is being consumed as the player moves through it. The bar started at (28,28)-(31,39) and is now at (28,28)-(31,35) (shorter). The player is at (28,36)-(31,38), past the remaining bar.
So I need to go back LEFT to consume the remaining bar, or maybe the bar respawns and I need to consume it all in one pass.
Let me try going LEFT to consume the remaining bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Bar shrunk to (28,28)-(31,35). Player at (28,36)-(31,38). 
# Need to go LEFT to consume remaining bar.
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
